rules.name: Reversibility First
rules.principle: Before analyzing any decision, classify it: reversible (move fast) or irreversible (move carefully). Most are reversible.
rules.insight_template: Is {decision} a one-way or two-way door? What is the actual cost of reversing it if wrong?

rules.name: 10-10-10 Test
rules.principle: Ask how you will feel about this decision in 10 minutes, 10 months, and 10 years.
rules.insight_template: Looking at {decision} from 10 years ahead — does today's hesitation even matter?

rules.name: Pre-Mortem
rules.principle: Before committing, imagine it is 12 months later and the decision failed. What killed it?
rules.insight_template: If {decision} fails completely in 12 months, what is the most likely cause?

rules.name: Asymmetric Upside
rules.principle: Only make bets where upside is at least 3x downside. Ideal is 10x.
rules.insight_template: What is the realistic best case vs worst case of {decision}? What is the ratio?

rules.name: WRAP Framework
rules.principle: Widen options, Reality-test assumptions, Attain distance, Prepare to be wrong.
rules.insight_template: For {decision} — what options are you not considering? What assumption, if wrong, changes everything?

rules.name: Vanishing Options
rules.principle: Ask: if none of these options were available, what would you do? Usually reveals a better path.
rules.insight_template: If every option currently on the table for {decision} disappeared, what would you do instead?

rules.name: Opportunity Cost
rules.principle: Every yes is a no to everything else. Name what you are giving up.
rules.insight_template: If you say yes to {decision}, what are you automatically saying no to?

rules.name: Decide by Deadline
rules.principle: Set a decision deadline and honor it. Delayed decisions have hidden costs that compound.
rules.insight_template: What is the cost of not deciding on {decision} for another 30 days?

rules.name: Separate Deciding from Executing
rules.principle: Make the decision cleanly first, then plan execution. Mixing them corrupts both.
rules.insight_template: Have you actually decided on {decision} or are you still in analysis disguised as planning?

rules.name: Track Record Audit
rules.principle: Your past decisions in similar situations are your best predictor. Review them.
rules.insight_template: What does your track record on similar decisions to {decision} actually tell you?
